titleStmt.title: SII 20.189: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 189. (B.K. No. 85 of 1936-37.) YĀRGAL (BHUJRUKH), SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 10, Vibhava, corresponding to A.D. 1208-09. Other details of the date are not specified.
The inscription records a gift of land made by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Bommidēvarasa of the Siḷāra family to the temple of Hayimēśvaradēva, constructed by him in the southern part of Viriṁgal.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁ
dracāmaracāravē traiḷō
kyanagarāraṁbhaṁ mūlasta
ṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svasti śrīmatu
(praṣvasti) yādavanārāyaṇa pra
tāpacarkavartti siṁgaṇadēvavije
rājyauttarōttarābhivṛddhiyiṁ caṁdrā
rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire dēvagiri
ya nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkhathāvi
nōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire śrīmatu
yādavacakravarti siṁgaṇadēvava
ruśada 10 neya vibhava saṁvatsarada
svasti śrīmatu mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ
tagaranagarādhīsvaraṁ siḷāravaṁśō
dubhavaṁ parahitabyasana jīmūtavāhanānva
yaprasūta boṭṭiganeṟaga girivajradaṁḍādhipa
(ca)nnama(ṁ)nneyapaṁnegavainatēya Oḍeyanaṁ
kakāṟa nāmādisamastaprasastisahita
ṁ śrīmanu mahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ bō(ṁ)mridēva
rasargge Uragurake koṭṭu dāyidoḍa(?) sa
rvvanamasyaṁ māḍi viriṁgallada dakṣiṇadiśābhā
gadalli tā pratiṣṭemāḍida hayimēśveradēvari
ge biṭṭa keyi mattaru 6 nivēsaṇa geyi
tōṭa kaluka mattaru śrī
Digital edition of SII 20.189 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
